Text: The authors of the communications are A.K., N.S. and M.N., nationals of Belarus. They claim that the State Party has violated their rights under articles 2 (1)–(3), 7, 9 (1), 19 (2), 21 and 26 (communication No. 3879/2021); articles 2, 9 and 19 (communication No. 3930/2021); and articles 2 (2) and (3), 19 and 21 (communication No. 3960/2021) of the Covenant.
In 2021 and 2023, the State Party submitted observations on admissibility and the merits of all the communications, which were transmitted to the authors for comment.

Given that the requests for the authors’ comments on the State Party’s observations went unanswered, reminders were sent to all the authors between 2022 and 2024. The authors were informed that, in the absence of a response, their communications might be discontinued.

On 17 July 2025, the Committee, in the light of the fact that it had received no response from the authors, with whom it had lost contact, decided to discontinue its consideration of communications No. 3879/2021, No. 3930/2021 and No. 3960/2021.
